mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name AS categoryName FROM blog_article a LEFT JOIN blog_category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.slug = #{slug}
SELECT slug, title FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND create_time < #{createTime} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT slug, title FROM blog_article WHERE status = 1 AND create_time > #{createTime} ORDER BY create_time ASC LIMIT 1
